name: ThousandEyes
description: Network intelligence and digital experience monitoring platform using global vantage points for internet and application visibility.

seo.title: ThousandEyes — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: ThousandEyes: Network intelligence and digital experience monitoring platform using global vantage points for internet and application visibility.

when_to_use: Global internet visibility from 200+ vantage points
End-to-end application path analysis for SaaS delivery
BGP routing and DNS resolution monitoring
Digital experience visibility for remote workforce apps

pros: Cisco backing for enterprise support and scale
Excellent for ISP and cloud-provider diagnosis
cons: Enterprise pricing prohibitive for smaller teams
Steep learning curve for full feature set
Overkill for simple uptime monitoring needs
review.verdict: The gold standard for network intelligence and DEM, at a price tag only enterprises can stomach.
review.best_for: Enterprises needing internet-scale visibility into SaaS, ISP, and cloud connectivity.
review.not_for: Startups or teams where basic synthetic monitoring suffices.
